text: Code reviews are an essential part of software development. When developers examine each other's code before it is merged, they can catch bugs early, when they are easier and cheaper to fix. Beyond finding errors, code reviews promote knowledge sharing within the team. Junior developers learn from the feedback of more experienced colleagues, while senior developers may discover new approaches or tools. This process helps spread understanding of the codebase across the team, preventing a single person from becoming indispensable. Ultimately, regular code reviews improve the overall quality of the software and help build a stronger, more collaborative team.
